steps.title: Use the direct meeting detail
steps.content: The passage states that Hayes and Wells had met while performing in a 1960 touring production of Lorraine Hansberry's A Raisin in the Sun. That identifies the circumstances of their first meeting.

steps.title: Reject later or invented events
steps.content: A mentions an NEC workshop, but NEC was founded after they met. B and C both involve The Great MacDaddy, which the passage places in 1974, long after their 1960 meeting. The answer is D.
